author: y4rr
content: [result] Added f16/bf16 auto-casting in safetensors loader. When loading a file with F16 or BF16 dtypes, values are automatically converted to the target Float type (f32 or f64). f16 uses IEEE 754 half-precision conversion, bf16 uses top-16-bits-of-f32 reinterpretation. 118 serialize tests pass, 0 warnings.
